OUR WORK

Projects

A look at what we've built

Umami House

A modern Asian fusion restaurant website designed with a clean UI and interactive user experience

🍜 Dynamic Menu Display — ramen, sushi, boba, and appetizers with descriptions and pricing
🎯 Category Filters & Smooth UI — interactive filtering and visually appealing dish cards
🎁 Loyalty Rewards System — tier-based membership (Bronze, Silver, Gold) with discounts
🤖 Custom Chatbot — fully JavaScript-based, no external APIs
🔐 Admin Portal — secure owner-only access to manage reservations, menu items, and memberships
Web AppFull StackRestaurantAdmin Portal
